meaning: adj.支持的,悬吊的,暂时中止的n.悬吊式,悬带
examples: Objective To analyze the effects of suspensory manner and step speed on suspension of crus prosthesis.
To evaluate the effect of suspensory intraocular lens implantation in the ciliary groove after ocular trauma.
Objective To investigate the method and curative effect of sternal suspensory traction on the patients with pectus excavatum.
